creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/gnome/> is much improved by <https://reviews.freebsd.org/D35587>. 

<https://www.freebsd.org/gnome/#_state_of_the_port>

> GNOME, MATE, and Cinnamon for FreeBSD are currently fully supported.

IMHO the page will benefit from a mention of the bugs(s) that affect AMD. Thoughts? 

See also: bug 257810
